calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Sauceda.
Petitioner: Daisy Delmi Rodriguez aka Delmy Del Carmen Rodriguez Guillen, present in pro per, and with Spanish Interpreter: Noemi Calonje.
Interpreter and Petitioner were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Delmy Del Camen Rodriguez Guillen.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-29-2005 Reset To Jan-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Delmy Del Carmen Rodriguez Guillen, present in pro per and with Spanish Interpreter: Cristina Llop from ACCESS.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
After hearing the testimony of the petitioner, the Court continued this matter to Jan. 10, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for Petitioner to submit an Amended Petition the re-publication of the OSC is no required.
